productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Gazelle 2 White Casual Shoes
description: Introduced in 1968 as a training shoe, the Gazelle 2 from adidas originals has a trademark of offering incredible cushioning. It's overwhelming popularity as a handball and indoor soccer game has kept up its popularity. Looks great even with jeans and hoodies.UpperSynthetic leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfootLacing system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protection, with textured foxingOutsoleTPR outsole with bee hive-shaped grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
